name: cogni-copywriting
description: Professional copywriting toolkit providing document polishing with messaging frameworks (BLUF, Pyramid, SCQA, STAR, PSB, FAB, Inverted Pyramid), stakeholder review via parallel persona Q&A, readability optimization, sales enhancement (Power Positions), multi-language support, JSON field polishing via the copy-json adapter, arc contract audit against cogni-narrative, and translation pass (translate then polish) across DE/EN/FR/IT/PL/NL/ES via an EN/DE pivot.
